message: Android preview 0.1.41 adds low-storage protection for PDF, image ZIP, long-image, and complete-backup exports. Storage failures now show a clear cleanup message, expose no internal path, and leave no final, 0 B, or hidden temporary document. Successful complete-backup imports refresh local content totals immediately. Public upgrade retention, destructive backup recovery, OPPO, Redmi, and Android 36 export checks passed.
